Crypto Tax Tracker

Get 5,000 Bits on Signup and Earn More with Every Transaction!
Track your crypto taxes and start earning rewards! First-time users get 5,000 Bits, and the more transactions you have, the more Bits rewards you earn ­¤żæ.

Mission description

Join our exclusive event designed to make crypto tax tracking effortless and rewarding. Sign up for Blockpit today and receive 5,000 Bits as a welcome bonus! Every transaction you track earns you additional Bits, so the more you use Blockpit, the more you gain ­¤żæ.

This is your chance to stay on top of your crypto taxes while reaping amazing rewards. With no cost to join, you can maximize your benefits and participate in exciting prize opportunities.

Start earning Bits and take control of your crypto tax tracking now! DonŌĆÖt miss outŌĆöthis event is live for a limited time.

­¤Æ░ Mission Cost:

Free!

­¤ōģ EVENT END DATE:

February 7, 2025

­¤Äē How Winners Will be Selected:

Ō£ģ Complete the Mission;

Ō£ģ More Blockchain Transactions - more chances of bits rewards!;

Ō£ģ Winners will be contacted separately.

ŌÜĪ Rules for Earning Bits with Blockpit:

  1. New users are eligible to receive a one-time bonus of 5,000 Bits upon completing their first signup.
  2. Bits are earned for every transaction tracked through Blockpit. The more transactions you track, the more Bits you accumulate.!
  3. To qualify for rewards, users must verify their accounts as per Blockpit's verification guidelines.
  4. Rewards are subject to daily or monthly limits to ensure fair distribution. Check the terms for current limits.
  5. Creating multiple accounts to claim rewards is prohibited and will result in disqualification.
  6. Accumulated Bits can be redeemed in accordance with Blockpit's redemption policies, and unused Bits may expire after a specified period.
